rationale: The postcondition is `H ==> det_equal` where H is the conjunction of the two original ensures. Asserting conjuncts of H at the top level fails (the prior attempt) because H is the antecedent of an implication, not a body-level hypothesis. Wrapping the proof in `if H { ... }` makes every conjunct of H a hypothesis inside the block; the mirrored asserts then verify, recorded as conditional facts that become unconditional under the antecedent during the postcondition check, giving z3 both copies of each spec-fn call (`well_typed_events`, `receive_packet_next`, `raw_io_consistent_with_spec_io`, `no_invalid_sends`, `HostState::invariants`) at the top level with matching shape — closing the trigger gap behind the SMT `unknown`.
